name: Festive
subtitle: Celebrate every festival in jewellery you love
description: From Diwali and Navratri to Eid and Christmas — our festive jewellery collection has designs for every celebration. Rich antique gold, vibrant Kundan, and classic temple jewellery bring the spirit of every festival alive.
styling_tips: For Diwali, classic gold jewellery never fails. For Navratri, go colourful with Kundan and multi-stone pieces. Match your jewellery colour to your outfit for a put-together festive look.
meta_description: Shop festive jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Diwali jewellery, Navratri jewellery, and festive sets in antique gold and Kundan.
